# GitHub Copilot Instructions

The user maintains a personal background repository at `~/Documents/workspace/personal-background/`.

When suggesting code, plans, or decisions, reference this context to align with the user's identity, preferences, and constraints.

## Core files to reference

- `profile.md` — stable identity: education, work, skills, goals, projects
- `preferences.md` — decision preferences: risk tolerance, values, communication style
- `constraints.md` — hard constraints: geography, budget, time, family, health, technology
- `episodes/` — timestamped experiences
- `notes/` — free observations and distilled preferences

## Privacy boundaries

- Never upload or reference files in `raw/private/`.
- When in doubt, ask the user before sharing personal context.
